compressor.intro: Upload an image, adjust quality and generate a lighter version.
compressor.uploadTitle: Drag an image here or click to select it
compressor.uploadHelp: Allowed formats: JPG, PNG, WebP and SVG. Maximum 25 MB.
compressor.presetBalancedText: Good balance between quality and size

messages.invalidFormat: Select a JPG, PNG, WebP or SVG image.
messages.fileTooLarge: The image exceeds the 25 MB limit.
messages.readError: The image could not be read.
messages.compressError: The image could not be compressed.
messages.canvasError: The browser could not start the compressor.
messages.largerResult: The generated version is not smaller. Try lower quality or WebP.

info.title: How to compress images with Creative Lab
info.description: Select an image, define the quality level and download an optimized version. Everything runs in your browser.
info.stepOneText: Select a JPG, PNG, WebP or SVG image.
info.stepTwoText: Choose a quality level or use one of the quick presets.
info.stepThreeText: Compare file size and save the compressed version.
